hardware: HPC gal-i9 cluster, Red Hat Enterprise Linux, Python 3.9.23
multisource_direction: from candidates (1148 < 1800 BGs) -- smart direction swap
notes: Single-chunk run. Smart direction: multi-source ran from 1148 candidates (fewer than 1800 BG sources), then transposed result. Standard Dijkstra ran from all 1800 BG sources sequentially for fair comparison.
